messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-607 — A pipeline role can raise a clarifying poll into its OWN topic mid-session and get the answer back into its own session — closing the gap that leaves the specifier making unilateral judgement calls
Approval context: Three design calls the intake explicitly flagged as needing human sign-off — and deliberately NOT resolved unilaterally, since "the specifier should not make unilateral judgement calls" is the whole point of this ticket.
(a) REUSE vs NEW TOOL. Recommendation: extend the existing operator_ask.bb / o…
BL-607 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-607" (or "reject BL-607 <reason>") to act.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-607 🎵 in progress — A pipeline role can raise a clarifying poll into its OWN topic mid-session and get the answer back into its own session — closing the gap that leaves the specifier making unilateral judgement calls
